description_long: This is a classic outdoor bench with a slatted seat and backrest, constructed from what appears to be painted or coated wood or metal. The bench features three horizontal slats forming the seat and three more for the backrest, all supported by three sturdy legs. The legs are reinforced with curved side supports, giving the bench both stability and a touch of decorative flair. The bench does not have armrests, making it accessible from either side. Its design is utilitarian yet inviting, suitable for parks, sidewalks, or public gardens. The finish is smooth and uniform, with visible bolts or fasteners securing the slats to the frame.
description: A sturdy, slatted bench with a backrest and three reinforced legs, finished in a smooth, uniform color. Designed for outdoor public spaces, it features a classic, accessible style without armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, three seat slats, three backrest slats, and all three supporting legs.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the curvature of the side supports, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the backrest slats and the three supporting legs, with the curved side supports visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, emphasizing the bench's open sides and structural supports.
attribute_leg_design: three straight legs with curved side supports
